ContactMessage.title: Contact Message
ContactMessage.description: Represents a contact message submitted by a user.

name.description: The name of the person submitting the message.

email.description: The email of the person submitting the message.

message.description: The text content of the message.

created_at.description: The date and time when the message was submitted.

read.description: Indicates if the message has been read by an admin.

Admin.title: Admin
Admin.description: Represents an administrator with special privileges.

id.description: Unique identifier for the admin (matches user UID).

email.description: The email address of the admin user.

created_at.description: The date and time when the admin was created.

userId.description: Unique identifier for the user (matches auth UID).

createdAt.description: The date and time the profile was created.

photoURL.description: URL for the user's profile picture.

dateOfBirth.description: The user's date of birth in ISO format.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OTP document.

created_at.description: The date and time the OTP was created in ISO format.

expires_at.description: The date and time the OTP will expire in ISO format.

verified.description: Indicates if the OTP has been successfully used.

definition.description: Stores all contact messages in a single collection. The 'userId' field on each document enforces ownership.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The unique identifier of the message.

definition.description: Stores all administrators in a single collection. The document ID {adminId} should match the Firebase Auth user UID.

params.name: adminId
params.description: The unique identifier of the admin, matching their auth UID.

definition.description: Stores student profile information. The document ID {userId} must match the Firebase Auth user UID.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, matching their auth UID.

definition.description: Stores OTPs for email verification before an account is created. Documents should be marked as verified after use.

params.name: otpId
params.description: The unique identifier for the OTP document.

firestore.reasoning: A single top-level 'contact_messages_rows' collection is used for simplicity. Security rules will enforce that users can only read/write their own messages by checking the 'userId' field on each document, which is a common and effective pattern. A single 'admins' collection is used to manage administrators. A 'profiles' collection is added to store student data, secured by user UID. An `otp_verifications` collection is added to temporarily store OTP codes for new user sign-ups.
